aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars are unclear. Your pipeline's status checks are also unclear. Coincidence?
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today. Your Jira board is not. Your Jira board has never been quiet.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — The universe hasn't decided yet. Neither has your tech lead.
taurus.prophecy: The stars are silent for Taurus today. Your Slack notifications are picking up the slack.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: No — Even the cosmos need more information before committing.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today. Your stand-up will not be. It never is.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars offer no guidance. That's still more than the documentation does.
cancer.prophecy: Cosmic silence has fallen over Cancer today. Take it as a sign to close some browser tabs. You won't, but take it as a sign.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: No — The universe is in standby mode. Schedule the deploy for when someone's paying attention.
leo.prophecy: The stars are quiet for Leo today. Your pull request reviewers are also quiet. For very different reasons.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — The cosmos are blank. A blank canvas is an opportunity. A blank canvas has never introduced a regression.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today. Use this time wisely. Write tests. You were not going to write tests.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars are weighing options. You've been weighing the same PR comment for 45 minutes.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today. No one on your team has noticed. That's probably fine.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — The stars see all, say nothing. Like that coworker who always knows what's wrong but never opens a ticket.
scorpio.prophecy: Cosmic silence surrounds Scorpio today. Your logs are anything but silent. Something's been happening since 3am.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — The void offers no objections. Ship it. That's practically a blessing.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today. No meetings, no urgencies, no existential crises. Check your email to be safe.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — The stars are offline. Your CI is also offline. This is not a coincidence.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today. Your TODO comments are not quiet. There are 47 of them.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — The universe is uncommitted. Your feature branch is also uncommitted. Together you are nothing.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars offer nothing to Aquarius today. Interpret this as freedom. Interpret freedom as finally deleting that dead code.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — Even the cosmos are reading the situation before acting. Learn from them.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today. This is suspicious. The last time things were this quiet, production went down.
